cmd.sessions.empty: No conversations yet — send a message to start one.
cmd.end.done: ✅ Ended the current conversation. A fresh one is ready.
cmd.compact.noop: Nothing to compact yet — the recent context is already kept verbatim.
cmd.handoff.done: ✅ Context summarized. A new conversation has been started.
cmd.handoff.desc: Summarize this conversation and continue it in a new session
cmd.consolidate.done: 🧠 Consolidated to L{{level}}: {{scopes}} fact scope(s), +{{nodes}} entities/{{edges}} relations, {{laws}} law(s).
cmd.why.desc: Explain why the agent believes something, traced through its memory
cmd.checkMemory.desc: Flag learned rules contradicted by a current fact (suppresses them until re-derived)
cmd.model.ambiguous:
Multiple providers match "{{alias}}". Choose one profile:
{{list}}
cmd.model.unknown: Unknown model profile: {{alias}}. Use /model to list available profiles.
cmd.effort.default: Reasoning effort now inherits the model default.
cmd.workdir.none: No working folder set — using the default workspace.
cmd.workdir.cleared: 📁 Working folder cleared — using the default workspace.
cmd.end.desc: End the current conversation and start fresh
cmd.compact.desc: Summarize and compact the context window now
cmd.consolidate.desc: Consolidate memory: dedup facts, then update the graph and laws (to your memory level)
cmd.model.desc: Show or switch the model for this conversation
cmd.effort.desc: Set the reasoning effort for this conversation
cmd.workdir.desc: Show or set the shared working folder for this conversation
